    ) []

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduled_executions (
      id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
      state text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled',
      change_request_id uuid REFERENCES change_requests(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
